description: Committee-designed QA recipe (James Bach SBTM + Cem Kaner BBST + Elisabeth Hendrickson Explore It + Kent Beck TDD + Michael Bolton RST). Agent-native: zero LLM API calls. $0.00/run.
architecture_note: This recipe produces evidence + analysis prompts. The AI coding agent reads outbox/report-*.json and applies its OWN model for analysis. Cost: $0.00 (no external LLM calls).

uplift_injection.P4_skills: HICCUPPS, SBTM, Explore It, BBST, charter-based, RST
uplift_injection.P5_recipes: 8-step recipe web / 7-step CLI / 8-step API — replay at $0.001
uplift_injection.P8_care: Anti-Clippy: never auto-approve. Fix proposals = proposals. Human decides.
uplift_injection.P9_knowledge: Paper 42 + Paper 02 inbox/outbox + Paper 40 FDA + Paper 06 ALCOA+
uplift_injection.P10_god: SHA-256 seal on every report. FDA 21 CFR Part 11. GLOW target: 65537.

web.description: Browser-accessible apps — Navigate + ARIA + DOM + Heuristics + Screenshot

cli.description: Command-line tools — Subprocess + exit code + stdout/stderr + assertions

api.description: REST/HTTP APIs — Request + response schema + status codes + headers

web_steps.description: Navigate to target URL — first visual evidence (P6: Access Tools)
Capture ARIA snapshot — full accessibility tree for structural analysis (P6)

web_steps.script: DOM extraction script (links, images, h1s, forms, title)
web_steps.description: DOM snapshot — links, images, headings, forms (P6: Access Tools)
HICCUPPS heuristics — ARIA, SEO, mobile, form labels, broken images, empty links (P4: Skills + P9: Knowledge)
Full-page screenshot for visual evidence and baseline diff (P7: Memory)
Build structured analysis prompt for the AI coding agent (P3: Famous Personas). NO LLM API call. Agent reads this and applies its own model.

personas_available.james_bach: SBTM + HICCUPPS — exploratory testing, quality risks, bug discovery
personas_available.cem_kaner: BBST + context-driven — purpose alignment, quality risk prioritization
personas_available.elisabeth_hendrickson: Explore It + charter-based — broken flows, error handling, usability
personas_available.kent_beck: TDD + testability — what to test first, what you fear is broken
personas_available.michael_bolton: RST — testing vs checking distinction, what the numbers don't show

web_steps.description: QA Score (0-100) + belt + GLOW from heuristics only — deterministic, reproducible (P1: Gamification)
Seal with SHA-256. FDA Part 11 compliant. Write to outbox. (P10: God + P7: Memory)

report_schema.agent_analysis_response: null | object (filled by AI coding agent)
report_schema.fix_proposals: array (proposed by agent, approved by human)

cli_steps.description: Execute CLI command — capture stdout, stderr, exit code
Assert checks — Kent Beck: test what you fear (P9: Knowledge)
Build analysis prompt for agent (P3: Famous Personas — agent-native)
Score from assertions passed ratio (P1: Gamification)
Seal CLI report with SHA-256 (P10: God)
